chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr. B.A. No. S- 656 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 30.6.2014 1. For orders on MA 5111/14 2. For orders on MA 5112/14 3. For hearing Mr. Mumtaz Ahmed Lashari advocate a/w applicant 1. Urgent application granted. 2. Exempted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Learned counsel inter alia submits that applicant / accused has falsely been booked in Crime No. 233 of 2014 registered at police station Kotri under Section 302 PPC by the complainant on the basis of enmity. He further submits that the applicant attempted to appear before the trial court for pre-arrest bail but the concerned police has surrounded by the premises of Sessions Court. He states that applicant / accused is a respectable person who in order to avoid humiliation and disgrace in case of his arrest at the hands of police has appeared before this court for protective bail to enable him to appear before the trial court. Without adverting to the merits of the case, the applicant / accused is granted protective bail for a period of 07 days commencing from today subject to his furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand only) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Notwithstanding the above order shall cease to have effect on 7.6.2014 or on any earlier date when the applicant shall appear before the trial court whichever occurs is earlier. In case the applicant failed to appear before the trial court within the stipulated period the surety furnished by him shall be forfeited. JUDGE k/-
